## Meeting purpose

[Discuss potential collaboration on SEO and content strategy between Matt Henderson (Sentry) and Marcel Santilli (fwd.digital)](https://fathom.video/share/br3NN9dhAKYkf_QYBouQ-4yY1jQxSoWr?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel has extensive experience building successful content programs and leveraging AI/offshore resources to scale content production efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/br3NN9dhAKYkf_QYBouQ-4yY1jQxSoWr?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [Marcel's agency growthacts offers dedicated resources and AI-powered workflows to create high-quality content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/br3NN9dhAKYkf_QYBouQ-4yY1jQxSoWr?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - [Matt is interested in exploring growthacts to augment Sentry's existing content efforts and drive more organic traffic growth](https://fathom.video/share/br3NN9dhAKYkf_QYBouQ-4yY1jQxSoWr?tab=summary&timestamp=1311.0)

## Topics

### Marcel's Background

  - [Previously built content programs at IBM, HP, HashiCorp, and other tech companies driving significant organic traffic growth](https://fathom.video/share/br3NN9dhAKYkf_QYBouQ-4yY1jQxSoWr?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [Developed AI-powered workflows at Deepgram to produce content at scale while maintaining quality](https://fathom.video/share/br3NN9dhAKYkf_QYBouQ-4yY1jQxSoWr?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
  - [Founded growthacts agency to offer dedicated resources and AI workflows for content production](https://fathom.video/share/br3NN9dhAKYkf_QYBouQ-4yY1jQxSoWr?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)

### growthacts Approach

  - [Focuses on planting many "high-quality seed" content pieces and nurturing/enriching the best performers](https://fathom.video/share/br3NN9dhAKYkf_QYBouQ-4yY1jQxSoWr?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)
  - [Leverages AI to assist with research, outlining, writing while maintaining human oversight](https://fathom.video/share/br3NN9dhAKYkf_QYBouQ-4yY1jQxSoWr?tab=summary&timestamp=416.0)
  - [Customizable workflows for technical content, including fact-checking, plagiarism checks, voice/tone matching](https://fathom.video/share/br3NN9dhAKYkf_QYBouQ-4yY1jQxSoWr?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)
  - [Connects related content through internal linking, CTAs based on search intent analysis](https://fathom.video/share/br3NN9dhAKYkf_QYBouQ-4yY1jQxSoWr?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)

### Sentry's Needs

  - [Currently at 1M monthly uniques but lacking a strong content hub/cornerstone strategy](https://fathom.video/share/br3NN9dhAKYkf_QYBouQ-4yY1jQxSoWr?tab=summary&timestamp=1365.0)
  - [Opportunity to repurpose/interconnect existing technical Q\&A content into larger guides](https://fathom.video/share/br3NN9dhAKYkf_QYBouQ-4yY1jQxSoWr?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Interested in growthacts model to increase content output efficiently while maintaining quality](https://fathom.video/share/br3NN9dhAKYkf_QYBouQ-4yY1jQxSoWr?tab=summary&timestamp=1324.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to review Sentry's existing content and provide analysis/recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/br3NN9dhAKYkf_QYBouQ-4yY1jQxSoWr?tab=summary&timestamp=1401.0)
  - [Regroup in 1 week to discuss specific opportunities for collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/br3NN9dhAKYkf_QYBouQ-4yY1jQxSoWr?tab=summary&timestamp=1417.0)
  - [Matt to check out growthacts workshop for additional context](https://fathom.video/share/br3NN9dhAKYkf_QYBouQ-4yY1jQxSoWr?tab=summary&timestamp=1704.0)
